backend/main.mo: Motoko actor that exposes a single `getAppInfo` function returning the app's name, version, and an empty icon blob.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing implemented features for the PDF Scanner component, including replacing the camera button with a file picker, auto edge-detection/crop, and per-page image adjustments.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: A JSON map of frontend source file paths to short summaries describing each file's purpose and notable implementation details.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS entry file that defines OKLCH-based CSS custom property design tokens for light and dark themes, including colors for UI components, charts, and sidebar.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the React SPA, mounting the app at `#root` and loading the TypeScript entry point via a module script.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up theming, renders the header/footer/tab navigation, and conditionally renders one of five tool modules based on the active tab.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer component displaying copyright text, a local-processing notice, and a branded link to caffeine.ai using the current hostname as a UTM parameter.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky header with the app logo, title, a connection status badge (shown when backend query succeeds), and a light/dark theme toggle button.
frontend/src/components/TabNavigation.ts: Horizontal scrollable tab bar rendering five tool tabs (Image Editor, PDF Converter, Image Converter, Passport Photo, BG Remover) with active-state styling.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor via React Query, using an anonymous or identity-authenticated actor depending on login state, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication on the ICP platform, managing login state, identity persistence, and AuthClient lifecycle.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines a React Query hook `useAppInfo` that fetches application info from the backend actor when it is available.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports fonts, sets up Tailwind CSS, and defines CSS custom properties for light/dark theme tokens including colors, sidebar, and chart variables.
frontend/src/lib/jszip.ts: Lazy-loads JSZip from CDN and exposes utilities to create ZIP archives from file entries and trigger browser downloads, plus a helper to convert data URLs to Blobs.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/modules/BackgroundRemover.t: Main background remover module component that orchestrates canvas-based image editing, brush painting, crop, zoom/rotation controls, and delegates to sub-panels for UI.
frontend/src/modules/BackgroundRemover/B: Renders a draggable slider component that overlays the original and processed images side-by-side for before/after comparison.
UI panel for controlling the brush tool, exposing paint/erase mode toggles, brush size selection, undo/clear actions, and an erase-selected-area button.
frontend/src/modules/BackgroundRemover/C: Renders an interactive SVG/div crop overlay with draggable corner, edge, and move handles that translate between display and image coordinate spaces. Handles both mouse and touch events to update a CropBox via the onCropChange callback.
frontend/src/modules/BackgroundRemover/E: Provides UI controls for downloading the background-removed result as PNG or JPG (direct download or ZIP), adjusting zoom, resetting the tool, and adding a background image. Uses jszip utilities and shows toast notifications for success/failure.
frontend/src/modules/BackgroundRemover/R: Renders the background removal control panel with options for auto-detect, output mode (transparent or custom color), a color picker with presets, and a Remove Background button with loading state.
frontend/src/modules/BackgroundRemover/u: Custom hook that manages all background remover state (image loading, canvas drawing, mask painting, crop, zoom, rotation, brush) and exposes actions like removeBackground, applyCrop, processManualErase, and undo. Coordinates a main canvas and a mask canvas via refs.
frontend/src/modules/ImageConverter.tsx: Top-level ImageConverter module component that composes upload, settings, preview, and export tabs using the useImageConversion hook. Manages tab navigation, selected image index, and passes callbacks down to child panel components.
frontend/src/modules/ImageConverter/Batc: Drag-and-drop and file-input upload panel that displays a grid thumbnail preview of queued images with individual remove buttons and a clear-all action. Includes a Next navigation button that is disabled until at least one image is added.
frontend/src/modules/ImageConverter/Befo: Renders a draggable before/after slider component that compares the original and converted images side by side, with touch and mouse support.
frontend/src/modules/ImageConverter/Conv: Provides a settings panel UI for configuring image conversion options including output format, quality, resize mode, dimensions, and filters.
frontend/src/modules/ImageConverter/Expo: Displays the export UI for converted images, including a convert-all button with progress tracking, per-image download, and bulk ZIP download.
frontend/src/modules/ImageConverter/useI: Custom hook and utilities for client-side image conversion using Canvas, supporting format changes, resizing, filter presets, and ZIP download.
frontend/src/modules/ImageEditor.tsx: Main image editor component that orchestrates canvas rendering, tool panels (adjust, crop, text, filters, resize), undo/redo, and export functionality.
frontend/src/modules/ImageEditor/Adjustm: Renders sliders for adjusting image brightness, contrast, and saturation, with a reset button to restore defaults.
frontend/src/modules/ImageEditor/CropOve: Renders an interactive crop overlay div on top of the image canvas, supporting drag handles (corners, edges, move) to adjust a crop rectangle, with Apply and Cancel buttons.
frontend/src/modules/ImageEditor/CropToo: Sidebar panel for cropping that provides a button to start interactive crop mode and quick aspect-ratio preset buttons (Free, 1:1, 4:3, 16:9, 3:2) plus a reset option.
frontend/src/modules/ImageEditor/ExportD: Modal dialog for exporting the edited image, allowing the user to choose format (JPEG, PNG, WebP) and quality, then triggering a download.
frontend/src/modules/ImageEditor/FilterP: Displays a grid of CSS filter preset buttons (Original, Vintage, B&W, HDR, etc.) and applies the selected filter to the image state.
frontend/src/modules/ImageEditor/ImageUp: Handles image input via file drag-and-drop, file picker, or device camera capture, passing the resulting data URL to the parent via a callback.
frontend/src/modules/ImageEditor/ResizeT: Sidebar panel with width/height inputs and an optional locked-aspect-ratio toggle that applies a resize operation to the image canvas.
frontend/src/modules/ImageEditor/TextLay: Renders draggable and rotatable text layer handles over the image canvas, translating between canvas coordinates and display coordinates for move and rotate interactions.
frontend/src/modules/ImageEditor/TextOve: React component for adding and configuring text layers on an image canvas, with controls for font, color, shadow, background, and placement via click or center-add.
frontend/src/modules/ImageEditor/Transfo: React component providing rotate (90°/180°) and flip (horizontal/vertical) transform controls for an image state object.
frontend/src/modules/ImageEditor/useImag: Custom React hook managing image canvas state including adjustments, filters, transforms, crop, text layers, and undo/redo history, plus a renderCanvas function that applies all effects.
frontend/src/modules/PassportPhotoConver: Main UI component for the Passport Photo Converter that handles file upload, drag-and-drop, preset selection, and renders the preview along with copy grid, text customization, and export panels.
Canvas-based component that renders a grid of passport photo copies on an A4 sheet at 300 DPI, with optional styled text overlays including background and shadow support.
UI panel that provides download (PNG, PDF, GIF), print, and ZIP export functionality for the generated A4 passport photo canvas.
Form panel for configuring text overlay options including font family, size, color, bold/italic, alignment, background, and shadow settings.
Custom React hook that manages passport photo state, image processing with sharpening/enhancement, A4 grid layout rendering, and export helpers for individual photo blobs.
frontend/src/modules/PDFConverter.tsx: Top-level PDF Converter module component that renders a tabbed UI delegating to sub-components for scanning, file management, merge/split, conversion, and PDF creation from images.
frontend/src/modules/PDFConverter/Conver: Component that displays a summary of queued PDF and image files, triggers conversion to a merged PDF, and provides a download button for the resulting file.
frontend/src/modules/PDFConverter/Create: Component for building a PDF from uploaded or camera-captured images, with optional enhancement and compression, plus a zip download option for the images.
frontend/src/modules/PDFConverter/MergeS: React component providing a 'Page Explorer' UI for importing PDFs and images, toggling page removal, and triggering a merge-and-download action with toast notifications.
frontend/src/modules/PDFConverter/PageMa: React component that loads PDF page thumbnails via PDF.js (fetched from CDN), lets users select and reorder pages via drag-and-drop, and remove selected pages from a chosen PDF file.
frontend/src/modules/PDFConverter/PDFFil: React component that renders a drag-and-drop upload zone and a list of loaded PDF/image files with remove buttons, plus a button to create and download a merged PDF.
frontend/src/modules/PDFConverter/PDFSca: React component for a document scanner workflow that lets users import images, apply brightness/contrast/darken-text adjustments, perform auto or manual cropping via canvas, and export the results as a PDF.
frontend/src/modules/PDFConverter/PDFUpl: Simple drag-and-drop upload panel component that accepts PDF files, displays them in a list with page counts, and allows individual removal.
frontend/src/modules/PDFConverter/usePDF: Custom React hook that manages PDF and image file state, dynamically loads pdf-lib and PDF.js from CDN, and exposes operations for merging, splitting, removing pages, creating PDFs from images, and a page-explorer merge workflow.
frontend/src/modules/VideoDownloader.tsx: React component that accepts YouTube or Facebook video URLs, fetches YouTube metadata via the YouTube Data API v3, displays video info (title, thumbnail, duration), and provides quality-selection options for downloading.
frontend/src/types/declarations.d.ts: TypeScript ambient module declarations for CDN-loaded libraries: pdf-lib, pdfjs-dist, and jszip, exposing their core classes and types to the TypeScript compiler.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration enabling dark mode, custom OKLCH-based color tokens, extended typography/animation/shadow utilities, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state manifest (version 51) describing the all-in-one conversion tool app's modules, architectural decisions, known issues, and a full list of implemented features for build planning continuity.
